T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 93 

COMMENT: The values in this field are also classified into four groups in the PRVDR_ENRLMT_STUS_CTGRY_CD 
variable. The PRVDR_MDCD_CHIP_ENRLMT_CD data element identifies whether the provider is 
enrolled in Medicaid, CHIP, both or not state plan affiliated.
